examples.esmValue:
Data Log #10.44.78

The Vault has been breached. There was not enough power to level Five!

God have mercy on our souls.

Data Log #10.44.78

The Vault has been breached. There was not enough power to level Five!

God have mercy on our souls.

This holotape is a list of battle reports and other incidents that have occurred at Ranger Station Foxtrot in the last few months. By Ranger Kudlow's account, things have been uneventful at the station.

This holotape contains an list of NCR personnel on active duty at Ranger Station Alpha. Aside from one Ranger who suffered a fractured ankle during a fall, the station has been at full strength for months.

This holotape contains a list a patrol reports dating back the last few months. Aside from an incident where an NCR patrol was wiped out by one of its own grenades - the result of trooper negligence - the reports are otherwise unremarkable.
Your regenerative ability has been enhanced by the PHOENIX Monocyte Breeder implant, causing you to slowly regenerate lost hit points.
Your skin has been toughened by the NEMEAN Sub-Dermal Armor, increasing your total Damage Threshold by 4.
Your frontal lobe has been enhanced with the Probability Calculator, increasing your Luck by 1.
Your cerebral cortex has been enhanced with the Logic Co-Processor, increasing your Intelligence by 1.
Your prefrontal cortex has been enhanced with the Empathy Synthesizer, increasing your Charisma by 1.

Obj10:Go to the Control Room in Hoover Dam and install the override chip.; Obj20:Activate the eastern power plant to power the Securitron Army.; Obj30:Exit out to the east side of the Dam.; Obj40:Head to the Legate's camp and deal with the Legate and Caesar's Legion.; Obj50:Deal with General Oliver and the NCR.; Obj90:Return to Mr House with news of your victory.
